must_do.full_text:
We're open sourcing a 9B model that extracts structured data from documents at near-frontier performance.

- 90.2% on our bench, vs Gemini 3.5 Flash at 91.3%
- Leads extraction models like NuExtract3 (81.5%)
- 9.5s p50 timings
- Pass JSON schema https://t.co/zIdRbGjaY5
must_do.summary: 开源9B文档数据提取模型，性能接近前沿（90.2%），超越NuExtract3，提供JSON Schema支持和9.5s响应时间。
angles: 9B模型性能追平Gemini 3.5，开源免费
文档提取神器开源：90.2%准确率+9.5s速度
替代NuExtract3的开源方案来了

must_do.full_text:
Amazon MGM is no longer releasing Luca Guadagnino's ‘ARTIFICIAL’, a biopic about OpenAI CEO Sam Altman.

The studio says the film will be better served at a different studio. It is important to note OpenAI inked a major partnership with Amazon recently.

(Source: https://t.co/yt6peVk9Mi
must_do.summary: 亚马逊MGM撤档卢卡·瓜达尼诺执导的OpenAI CEO萨姆·奥特曼传记片《ARTIFICIAL》。官方称影片将在其他制片厂更合适，但时机敏感——OpenAI与亚马逊刚签署重大合作协议。
angles: 亚马逊突然撤档Sam Altman传记片，背后隐情曝光
OpenAI与亚马逊合作后，这部电影为何被雪藏？
好莱坞与科技巨头的权力游戏：一部电影的消失

must_do.full_text: A bit of news: After nearly 9 years, I have decided to leave Google DeepMind and join Anthropic (after taking some time to recharge). I am incredibly grateful for my time at GDM. @demishassabis took a real chance letting me lead the AlphaFold team just six months after finishing
must_do.summary: DeepMind AlphaFold团队负责人John Jumper宣布离职，加入Anthropic。在DeepMind工作近9年，领导AlphaFold项目取得突破性成就，现转向AI安全公司。
angles: AlphaFold之父离职DeepMind，投身Anthropic
9年后他选择离开：从AlphaFold到AI安全的转身
科技人才流向：顶级科学家为何离开谷歌

must_do.full_text: Thanks John for an extraordinary partnership and wonderful collaboration over the past 9 years! What we achieved with AlphaFold changed the world, and showed the field what was possible with AI for science and medicine, lighting the way for how AI can benefit humanity.
must_do.summary: Demis Hassabis感谢John Jumper在DeepMind的9年合作，特别肯定AlphaFold对科学和医学领域的革命性贡献，强调AI造福人类的潜力。
angles: DeepMind创始人Demis的公开感谢：AlphaFold改变了世界
从AlphaFold到Anthropic：科技领袖的接力
AI改变科学：一个9年合作的成就总结

must_do.full_text:
A developer in China named tw93 got tired of his laptop dying.

He would open Slack and watch 524 megabytes of disk space disappear. He would open Discord and watch another 265. He would open Notion and watch 800 megabytes of RAM evaporate before he had typed a single word.

He https://t.co/7M1XNIf9Zs
must_do.summary: 中国开发者tw93因笔记本电量耗尽而创建轻量级应用。Slack占524MB、Discord占265MB、Notion占800MB内存。这是一个开发者工具创意故事，展现效率优化的实际需求。
angles: 中国开发者怒了：Slack吃掉524MB，他做了个替代品
笔记本电量危机催生的轻量级工具革命
Notion/Slack/Discord太重了？看他如何优化

must_do.full_text:
BREAKING: Jensen Huang says the biggest mistake people make about AI is seeing it as a threat, instead of a tool to amplify human potential.

AI won’t destroy human jobs but will rebuild American industry & create a massive new wave of builders, technicians, engineers, & makers. https://t.co/w8qhFwGyUz
must_do.summary: 英伟达CEO黄仁勋发表观点：AI是工具而非威胁，将创造建筑师、技术员、工程师等新职业机会，重建美国工业。
angles: 黄仁勋最新观点：AI不会毁灭工作，反而创造百万新机会
英伟达CEO怒怼AI威胁论，揭示产业重建真相

priority.full_text:
LLM combinations that create powerful agents

Backend-coder- GPT 5.5 + Codex 5.3
Ppt creator - Opus 4.8 + Sonnet 4.8
Search - Flash 3.5 + Grok API
Video agent -  Sonnet + SeeDance 2.0
Image agent - Haiku +  GPT Image 2
Massively parallel - Opus 4.8 + Kimi 2.7 / Deepseek Flash
priority.summary: LLM组合方案集合：展示GPT、Claude、Gemini等模型的最优配对组合，用于后端编码、PPT生成、搜索、视频和图像生成等场景。
angles: 5个LLM黄金组合方案，提升工作效率
后端编码到视频生成，最强模型配对指南
不同场景的最优LLM组合方案
